add.description:
Adds a data stream or index to an alias.
If the alias doesn’t exist, the `add` action creates it.

remove.description: Removes a data stream or index from an alias.

remove_index.description:
Deletes an index.
You cannot use this action on aliases or data streams.

alias.description:
Alias for the action.
Index alias names support date math.

aliases.description:
Aliases for the action.
Index alias names support date math.

filter.description: Query used to limit documents the alias can access.

index.description:
Data stream or index for the action.
Supports wildcards (`*`).

indices.description:
Data streams or indices for the action.
Supports wildcards (`*`).

index_routing.description:
Value used to route indexing operations to a specific shard.
If specified, this overwrites the `routing` value for indexing operations.
Data stream aliases don’t support this parameter.

is_write_index.description: If `true`, sets the write index or data stream for the alias.

routing.description:
Value used to route indexing and search operations to a specific shard.
Data stream aliases don’t support this parameter.

search_routing.description:
Value used to route search operations to a specific shard.
If specified, this overwrites the `routing` value for search operations.
Data stream aliases don’t support this parameter.

must_exist.description: If `true`, the alias must exist to perform the action.

alias.description:
Alias for the action.
Index alias names support date math.

aliases.description:
Aliases for the action.
Index alias names support date math.

index.description:
Data stream or index for the action.
Supports wildcards (`*`).

indices.description:
Data streams or indices for the action.
Supports wildcards (`*`).

must_exist.description: If `true`, the alias must exist to perform the action.

Supports wildcards (`*`).

Supports wildcards (`*`).
